THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STEVENS, WILLIAM JAMES THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 85 FARRALLONES, S.F, CA., STAYED UNTIL MAY-31-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, WRIT TO ISSUE IMMEDIATELY, BUT EVICTION STAYED TO 5PM, 5-31-94. DEF. REPRESENTS THERE ARE NO OTHER OCCUPANTS WITH RIGHT OF POSSESSION. MUTUAL RELEASE OF CLAIMS. NO FURTHER STAYS ON EVICTION. SEE FILE FOR COMPLETE JUDGMENT DETAILS.
